seoTitle: How to Change Wix Forms Submission Email Address
metaDescription: Learn how to update the recipient email address for Wix form submissions and add secondary notification addresses.
intro: If your Wix contact form notifications are still going to an old team member's inbox, updating the recipient address takes just a few clicks. This guide covers finding the right form settings, swapping the primary recipient, and optionally adding secondary addresses so multiple team members get notified.

steps.heading: Select your form
steps.body: Open your Wix editor and click the form component you want to update.

steps.heading: Open Form Settings
steps.body: Click the floating settings icon on the form to launch its preference panel.

steps.heading: Go to Email Notifications
steps.body: Navigate to the Settings tab and open the Email Notifications subtab.

steps.heading: Update the recipient address
steps.body: Swap out the old email address for the new one in the primary recipient field.

steps.heading: Add secondary recipients if needed
steps.body: Optionally append additional addresses so multiple team members receive submission alerts.

steps.heading: Test with a mock submission
steps.body: Submit a test entry in preview mode to confirm the notification lands in the correct inbox.

faq.question: Can I send form notifications to multiple people?
faq.answer: Yes, you can append secondary email addresses in the same Email Notifications panel to enable multi-recipient delivery.

faq.question: Will changing the recipient address affect past submissions?
faq.answer: No, this only changes where future notifications are sent — it doesn't alter any previously received submissions.

faq.question: Does the Wix Inbox need updating too?
faq.answer: It's worth checking your main dashboard's Wix Inbox sync settings to make sure they still reflect your changes.

faq.question: How do I confirm the change worked?
faq.answer: Submit a mock entry through the live preview and check that the notification arrives at the newly configured address.
